title: cuphea koehneana
intro: Cuphea koehneana, also known as the Mexican heather, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Cuphea koehneana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized.
